params.name: hWnd
params.desc: Handle to owner window, 0 for no owner

MessageBoxW.desc: Displays a modal dialog box with a message and buttons

params.name: lpClassName
params.desc: Window class name, or empty string

FindWindowW.desc: Retrieves handle to top-level window by class/title

GetForegroundWindow.desc: Retrieves handle to the foreground window

params.name: hWnd
params.desc: Handle to the window to activate

SetForegroundWindow.desc: Brings the specified window to the foreground

SendMessageW.desc: Sends a message to a window and waits for processing

PostMessageW.desc: Posts a message to a window queue and returns immediately

params.name: nMaxCount
params.desc: Max characters to copy including null

GetWindowTextW.desc: Copies the title bar text of a window into a buffer

ShowWindow.desc: Sets the show state of a window

params.name: lpPoint
params.desc: Pointer to POINT struct receiving coordinates

GetCursorPos.desc: Retrieves the cursor position in screen coordinates

params.name: X
params.desc: New X coordinate in screen pixels

params.name: Y
params.desc: New Y coordinate in screen pixels

SetCursorPos.desc: Sets the cursor position in screen coordinates

params.name: lpRect
params.desc: Pointer to RECT struct receiving window area

GetWindowRect.desc: Retrieves the bounding rectangle of a window

GetTickCount64.desc: Retrieves milliseconds since system start without wrap

Sleep.desc: Suspends the current thread for the specified time

GetLastError.desc: Retrieves the calling thread's last error code

params.name: lpModuleName
params.desc: Module name, or empty for calling process

GetModuleHandleW.desc: Retrieves a module handle for the specified module

params.name: lpLibFileName
params.desc: Name or path of the DLL

LoadLibraryW.desc: Loads a DLL into the calling process

GetProcAddress.desc: Retrieves the address of a function from a DLL

params.name: lpOperation
params.desc: Action such as open or runas

params.name: lpFile
params.desc: File or URL to act on

ShellExecuteW.desc: Opens, prints, or launches a file or URL

params.name: cbAttribute
params.desc: Size of attribute value in bytes

DwmSetWindowAttribute.desc: Sets Desktop Window Manager rendering attributes for a window

CoInitialize.desc: Initializes the COM library on the current thread

CoUninitialize.desc: Closes the COM library on the current thread
